name: Castle Entrance
description: Cold stone towers over you as the heavy gate stands ajar. The air smells of rain and iron.

name: Cobble Approach
description: Worn steps lead up from the gate. Moss fills the cracks between the stones, and you hear the wind in the parapets above.

name: Courtyard
description: An open yard of slick cobblestones. A dry fountain sits at the center, and torchlight flickers along the walls. A narrow passage leads north into older stone.

name: Armory Lane
description: Weapon racks line the walls, mostly bare. Rust flakes under your boots, and drafts carry a smell of wet earth from deeper in.

name: Collapsed Cell
description: A fallen beam splits the corridor. Beyond it, iron bars twist in the rubble—whatever was kept here is long gone, but the dark still feels watchful.
